ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF WANG, DEAN
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF WANG, DEAN AS TO DEFENDANT TOM, JOHNSON AN INDIVIDUAL DBA TOM'S CONSTRUCTION

REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF WANG, DEAN AS TO DEFENDANT TOM, JOHNSON AN INDIVIDUAL DBA TOM'S CONSTRUCTION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
